name: Rockwood Holdings, Inc.
description: Rockwood Holdings, Inc. was a global developer, manufacturer, and marketer of technologically advanced and high value-added specialty chemicals and advanced materials. Headquartered in Princeton, New Jersey, the company served a wide range of industrial and commercial markets, providing essential components for applications such as paints, coatings, plastics, and electronics. Founded in 2000, Rockwood established itself as a significant player in the specialty chemicals sector before being acquired by Albemarle Corporation in 2015, a strategic move that significantly expanded Albemarle's presence in the lithium and surface treatment industries.
